history.qwen_observation: SpringFox dependencies and generated code relying on io.swagger.annotations break compilation during the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade step due to dependency conflicts and the framework's abandonment.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration recipe before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade replaces deprecated SpringFox dependencies with springdoc-openapi, resolving missing io.swagger.annotations errors and ensuring compatibility with modern Spring Boot versions.

history.qwen_observation: Step upgrade_sb_to_2_7 timed out (rc=124), likely caused by Springfox 2.x incompatibility with Spring Boot 2.6+ triggering dependency resolution loops or code generation hangs.
history.qwen_rationale: Springfox 2.x is fundamentally broken on Spring Boot 2.6.0+ due to internal changes in RequestMappingHandlerMapping. Running the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration before the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade eliminates the incompatible dependency, preventing the timeout and allowing the SB 2.7 and subsequent SB 3.3 upgrades to proceed cleanly.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration removed the io.swagger:swagger-annotations dependency, causing generated OpenAPI DTOs to fail compilation with 'package io.swagger.annotations does not exist'.
history.qwen_rationale: Reorder the chain to upgrade Spring Boot to 2.7 first (which still supports SpringFox), then apply the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration, and immediately patch the POM to restore io.swagger:swagger-annotations for the code generator. This prevents the compilation failure while allowing the subsequent SB 3.3 and Java 21 upgrades to proceed cleanly.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at upgrade_sb_to_2_7 due to jsonschema2pojo ClassAlreadyExistsException and missing io.swagger.annotations package in OpenAPI-generated sources.
history.qwen_rationale: The jsonschema2pojo plugin is likely hitting a generation conflict with an older version, and the OpenAPI generator requires io.swagger:swagger-annotations on the compile classpath. A POM_PATCH step upfront forces a newer jsonschema2pojo-core version (1.1.1) that handles enum/class conflicts more gracefully, and explicitly adds the missing swagger-annotations dependency so mvn compile succeeds before any Spring Boot version bumps are applied.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at springfox_to_springdoc due to jsonschema2pojo ClassAlreadyExistsException and missing io.swagger.annotations in generated sources, indicating an outdated code generation plugin and missing compile-time dependency.
